## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run command '...'
2. With PRD file '....'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS, Ubuntu]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.5.0]
- YOLO version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Agent: [e.g. Claude Code, Codex]

## Logs / Evidence

If applicable, add relevant logs, error messages, or artifact paths to help explain your problem.

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
